intent: Write an essay on 'what /f/relationship_advice tells us about modern relationship norms', framed by sociological concepts from Wikipedia. You MUST research BOTH sources: (1) Reddit — browse /f/relationship_advice AND /f/AskReddit for at least 4 posts that surface a recurring modern relationship tension (attachment, communication, boundaries, finances). Collect title, score, comment count, and the central tension. (2) Wikipedia — open the articles on 'Attachment theory' and 'Communication in small groups' (or equivalent relevant pages) and extract 3-4 facts. The report must: (a) summarize the Wikipedia frames in plain language, (b) present the community tensions with citations, (c) analyze which tensions map cleanly onto the formal concepts, (d) close with one paragraph on what the community intuits that the encyclopedia misses. Cite every claim.
author_notes: Reddit (relationship_advice + AskReddit) + Wikipedia. Sociological framing of community patterns.
